scripts.db:migrate:new: npx --yes wrangler@latest d1 migrations create rankmaker
scripts.db:migrate:list: npx --yes wrangler@latest d1 migrations list rankmaker --local
scripts.db:migrate:local: npx --yes wrangler@latest d1 migrations apply rankmaker --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npx --yes wrangler@latest d1 migrations apply rankmaker --remote
scripts.db:counts:remote: npx --yes wrangler@latest d1 execute rankmaker --remote --command "SELECT slug, COUNT(*) AS n FROM rankings GROUP BY slug ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 15"
